arts.ttl: Preview: Queens Park Rangers vs. Leeds United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Queens Park Rangers and Leeds United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Joel Piroe has two words for controversial Leeds United v Millwall refereeing
arts.sum: “Unacceptable” – Leeds denied stunning Joel Piroe goal through offside Leeds United won 2-0 at home to Millwall on Wednesday night, but could have opened up a bigger lead in the first half if not for an extremely tight offside call.

arts.ttl: QPR v Leeds: Grim R’s team news revealed
arts.sum: The R’s are in a poor run of form in the last nine games since January 25, losing seven and winning the other two – scoring 10 and conceding 13 in that span of matches. Last season, Leeds needed to claim victory at Loftus Road in order to maintain their chances of automatic promotion over Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Leeds United man's mystery absence vs Millwall explained as Farke faces 'late' QPR decisions
arts.sum: "As it stands I hope I have that whole group plus Isaac Schmidt to pick from for the travelling squad," he said. Leeds United could be boosted by the return of Isaac Schmidt for the trip to Queens Park Rangers.

From the moment the full-time whistle blew on Wednesday night, Leeds’ focus shifted quickly to preparing for a trip to QPR, looking for revenge from last season’s gutting 4-0 defeat. Farke previewed the game in his pre-match press conference on Thursday, in which he delivered the latest team news from the squad, with Joe Rothwell limping off with knee trouble late on against Millwall.

arts.ttl: Championship TV games announced as Leeds United learn kick-off time change for crucial game
arts.sum: Speaking after their 1-0 loss at Blackburn Rovers at the end of November, Whites chief Daniel Farke said: "I don't like early kick-offs and especially with three games in six days but I don't complain about this, we're used to it. The date of the Elland Road fixture remains Saturday, April 12, but the Championship tussle will now kick off at 12:30pm.

arts.ttl: Kalvin Phillips: Man City asking price 'revealed' as 'verbal agreement' is reached to re-join Leeds this summer
arts.sum: Championship title hopefuls Leeds United are reportedly 'very much on course' to bring Kalvin Phillips back to Elland Road in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke told Leeds United's summer transfer priority as Premier League claim made
arts.sum: He told MOT News: "[Brenden] Aaronson, I’ve said for a long time, he’s one player that Leeds could replace. I don’t think he’s a Premier League player.

arts.ttl: Farke press conference: Leeds fitness concern?
arts.sum: Leeds United may have beaten Millwall 2-0 on Wednesday night, but attention now swiftly turns towards a trip down to QPR on Saturday afternoon. Shortly after, Leeds brought on Largie Ramazani and Mateo Joseph to see out stoppage time in place of Dan James and Joel Piroe – and the five subs combined for a meagre 20 touches of the ball.

arts.ttl: Joe Rothwell concern emerges amid looming Leeds United transfer question
arts.sum: The manager underlined how he was not pitch perfect and said there are still elements of his game to improve, including with goals and assists. “If it happens with the same assistant in back to back games, it is difficult to accept,” an angry Farke said, who revealed the club has recieved an apology for the Gnonto no-goal.
